arts.ttl: 'Kick myself' - former Manchester United coach open to return but worried about what he'll find
arts.sum: Rene Meulensteen was at Man Utd as an assistant manager to Sir Alex Ferguson and he remains in contact with current assistant Ruud van Nistelrooy.

arts.ttl: 'Worst Premier League manager ever' rips into Man Utd's countless 'stupid mistakes'
arts.athr: reporters@dailyrecord.co.uk (Ben Crawford, Aaron Morris, Mark Whiley)
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag is under mounting pressure at Manchester United - and has now been slammed by the man Jose Mourinho dubbed the 'worst' manager in Premier League history

arts.ttl: Tottenham defend flying back from Man Utd win after fan backlash to James Maddison video
arts.sum: Tottenham decided to charter a private jet to whisk their players back to north London following their win over Manchester United at Old Trafford - all to save a few hours

arts.ttl: Porto vs Manchester United live Europa League updates plus early team news and how to watch

arts.sum: Man United continue their Europa League campaign tonight with a trip to Portugal to take on Porto

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag breaks silence on Dan Ashworth relationship amid Man United sack talk
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag is under pressure at Manchester United after a dismal start to the season and the Dutchman has now spoken out about his relationship with Dan Ashworth

arts.ttl: I won Treble with Man United – but Sir Alex Ferguson almost sacked me before I apologised
arts.sum: Peter Schmeichel has recalled the moment he almost got the sack at Manchester United after he lost his temper with Sir Alex Ferguson following a tough day at the office

arts.ttl: What Zinedine Zidane Said to David Beckham after Man Utd 4-3 Real Madrid
arts.sum: David Beckham has revealed what Zinedine Zidane said to him after the famous Champions League match between Man Utd and Real Madrid in 2003

arts.ttl: Liverpool already know Ruud van Nistelrooy and Erik ten Hag’s view on 'new £42m target'
arts.sum: Manchester United duo Erik ten Hag and Ruud van Nistelrooy have both previously been linked with a move for one Euro 2024 star, who is gaining interest at Liverpool

arts.ttl: 'Man Utd had small, closed mentality – they made me pay £1 for a fruit juice'
arts.sum: The iconic Zlatan Ibrahimovic enjoyed a stellar stint at Old Trafford from 2016 to 2018, but he has since bemoaned goings on behind the scenes at Manchester United

arts.ttl: Key Manchester United figures frustrated by missed £100m transfer opportunity
arts.sum: Some key figures at Manchester United are reportedly frustrated that they may well have missed out on banking as much as £100million for their former player Mason Greenwood in the future.
